data.biography: 毕业于吉林艺术学院播音主持专业影视配音，曾是音熊联萌配音工作室成员。
data.name: 王宇航

data.biography: A voice actor from China.  Casted for playing the "old men" roles. Popularly known as the VA for Svarog from Honkai Star Rail, Młynar from Arknights and Patriot in the Arknights anime.
data.name: Wang Yuhang

data.biography: 畢業於吉林藝術學院播音主持專業影視配音，曾是音熊聯萌配音工作室成員。
data.name: 王宇航
